text.title: Google Ads Campaign Setup Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: wire conversion tracking; verify 24-hour firing before campaign create
create as PAUSED; flip to ENABLED only after checklist

branch.when: conversion_tracking_firing == true AND campaign_status == 'PAUSED' AND display_partners == 'enabled'

conclusion.verdict: disable Display + Partners explicitly via API

branch.when: conversion_tracking_firing == true AND campaign_status == 'PAUSED' AND display_partners == 'disabled' AND rsa_headlines < 15

conclusion.verdict: expand RSA to 15 headlines + 4 descriptions before launch

branch.when: conversion_tracking_firing == true AND campaign_status == 'PAUSED' AND display_partners == 'disabled' AND rsa_headlines >= 15

conclusion.verdict: run pre-launch checklist; flip ENABLED on pass

example.trace: conversion_tracking_firing == true AND campaign_status == 'PAUSED' AND display_partners == 'disabled' AND rsa_headlines >= 15 → conclusion ref="pre-launch-checklist" verdict="run pre-launch checklist; flip ENABLED on pass"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
